title: Syracuse Common Council honors President Helen Hudson
summary: Syracuse Common Council President Helen Hudson returned from medical leave following cancer treatment and was honored by the council with a unanimous vote to name a street after her. Hudson, the first Black woman to serve as council president, received public recognition from colleagues for her leadership and community contributions.

political_signal.description: Council demonstrates strong support for returning leadership with unanimous vote and public recognition of Hudson's historic role as first Black woman council president

processing_notes: Article references 'Rezone Syracuse vote' in headline but content focuses on Hudson honor; limited operational/CIO relevance
Street naming requires Onondaga County approval - intergovernmental coordination item
